title: [codereview] coap_status.c: conversion warnings in encode functions
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:267 and multiple lines show -Wconversion warnings for int to uint8_t and size_t to uint16_t. This is P3 (build cleanliness) and potential truncation bug for large payloads. Tag: codereview. Fix by adding explicit casts or size checks.
